title: After falling far behind the rest of industry, Blue Origin creates new stock option plan
summary: Blue Origin has introduced a new stock option plan to attract talent after lagging behind aerospace industry competitors on compensation. The initiative addresses recognized gaps in competing for top talent in the sector.
content: "It's a big fat middle finger for those that thought they had something."

title: Apple smart home display rumors now point to a fall launch with iOS 27
summary: Apple's long-rumored smart home display with a screen has been delayed again, now targeting a fall 2026 launch alongside iOS 27. The device is waiting for completion of Siri's AI chatbot update, which is also being pushed back.
content:
The rumored "HomePod with a screen" we've heard so much about was reportedly lined up for launch in 2025, and then this spring, and now, according to the latest updates, it's on the shelf until this fall. Leaker Kosutami posted as much on X last week, and today, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman followed up with similar information, saying its robot arm-equipped cousin is now planned for launch in 2027. 
According to Gurman, the J490 smart home display / HomePad is waiting for Apple to finish work on its chatbot-style AI update for Siri.
That was supposed to be ready by now, but it is now predicted to arrive later this year, along with the iP …

title: The government shutdown is hitting airports — but not ICE
summary: The government shutdown has caused severe disruptions at airports, with TSA and Coast Guard workers going weeks without pay and turning to food banks. However, ICE operations have continued unabated despite efforts to curtail DHS funding.
content:
Department of Homeland Security. | Image: The Verge	

Chaos reigned at airports across the country last weekend, with thousands of travelers reportedly waiting in hours-long security lines thanks to staffing shortages. Transportation Security Administration (TSA) and Coast Guard workers have turned to food banks for assistance after weeks without pay. But amid a partial government shutdown aimed at curtailing the Department of Homeland Security's mass arrests and deportations, federal agents have continued their anti-immigrant crackdown unabated - and for now, there's not much anyone can do.
DHS has gone without funding for four weeks in a standoff over immigration enforcement. Congressional D …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 政府关闭正在打击机场，但ICE除外
zh.summary: 政府关闭在机场造成严重中断，运输安全管理局和海岸警卫队工作人员数周无薪，转向食物银行。然而，尽管努力削减国土安全部的资金，ICE的运营仍在继续。

Cependant, les opérations d'ICE se sont poursuivies sans entrave malgré les efforts pour réduire le financement du DHS.

Die ICE-Operationen haben jedoch ungeachtet der Bemühungen, die DHS-Finanzierung zu kürzen, ungehindert fortgesetzt.

es.summary: El cierre del gobierno ha causado interrupciones graves en los aeropuertos, con trabajadores de la TSA y la Guardia Costera sin pago durante semanas y recurriendo a bancos de alimentos. Sin embargo, las operaciones de ICE han continuado sin obstáculos a pesar de los esfuerzos por reducir el financiamiento del DHS.

title: Everything from the last week of everything is gambling now
summary: Prediction market platform Kalshi is facing a class action lawsuit alleging it failed to pay out bets on Iranian leader Ayatollah Khamenei's death, claiming the company delayed implementing a payout rule after his death occurred. The lawsuit highlights challenges in regulating prediction market edge cases.
content:
Kalshi is facing backlash from its own users after a class action lawsuit was filed last week alleging it failed to pay out as promised for wagers regarding when Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah ​Ali Khamenei would leave or be removed from office. Khamenei was killed in strikes on Iran last month, but according to the lawsuit, Kalshi didn't implement a "death carveout" until after Khamenei had died. 
Meanwhile, Kalshi is reportedly working to attract more women to its platform in an effort to grow its user base. As the Wall Street Journal reported on Sunday, the percentage of women using Kalshi has doubled over the past ten months, growing  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

fr.summary: La plateforme de marché de prédiction Kalshi fait face à un recours collectif alléguant qu'elle n'a pas versé les paris sur la mort du chef iranien l'ayatollah Khamenei, affirmant que l'entreprise a retardé la mise en œuvre d'une règle de paiement après sa mort. Le procès met en évidence les défis de la réglementation des cas limites des marchés de prédiction.

de.title: Alles aus der letzten Woche ist jetzt Glücksspiel
de.summary: Die Vorhersagemarktplattform Kalshi sieht sich einer Sammelbeschwerde ausgesetzt, die behauptet, dass sie Wetten auf den Tod des iranischen Führers Ayatollah Khamenei nicht auszahlt, und besagt, dass das Unternehmen die Umsetzung einer Auszahlungsregel nach seinem Tod verzögert hat. Die Klage verdeutlicht die Herausforderungen bei der Regulierung von Grenzfällen auf Vorhersagemärkten.

es.title: Todo lo de la última semana ahora es apuestas

La demanda destaca los desafíos de regular casos extremos en mercados de predicción.

title: Employees across OpenAI and Google support Anthropic’s lawsuit against the Pentagon
summary: Nearly 40 employees from OpenAI and Google, including chief scientist Jeff Dean, filed an amicus brief supporting Anthropic's lawsuit against the Pentagon over supply chain risk designation. The brief details concerns about the Trump administration's decision and potential impacts on technology development.
content:
On Monday, Anthropic filed its lawsuit against the Department of Defense over being designated as a supply chain risk. Hours later, nearly 40 employees from OpenAI and Google - including Jeff Dean, Google's chief scientist and Gemini lead - filed an amicus brief in support of Anthropic's lawsuit, detailing their concerns over the Trump administration's decision and the technology's risks and implications.
The news follows a dramatic few weeks for Anthropic, in which the Trump administration labeled the company a supply chain risk - a designation typically reserved for foreign companies that the government deems a potential risk to national  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Bluesky CEO Jay Graber will step aside
summary: Jay Graber is stepping down as CEO of Bluesky after leading the social network from its split from Twitter's research project to 40 million users. Venture capitalist Toni Schneider will serve as interim CEO while Graber transitions to Chief Innovation Officer.
content:
Bluesky Social Jay Graber speaks on stage during 2025 Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies Summit & Gala at Jacob Javits Center on June 05, 2025 in New York City. () | Photo by Eugene Gologursky/Getty Images for Fast Company	

Jay Graber became the first CEO of Bluesky in 2021 when the network and its AT Protocol spun out from life as a Twitter research project to go independent, but now she's leaving that role, as reported previously by Wired. While venture capitalist and former Automattic CEO Toni Schneider steps in as interim CEO until a permanent replacement is found, Graber says she will become Bluesky's Chief Innovation Officer, focused on building new things for a platform that has gone from 30 million users about a year ago, to 40 million currently.
According to Graber, "Toni believes deeply in the Bluesky mission, and has been an advisor to the company a …

title: You can get three months of Disney Plus and Hulu for $15
summary: Disney is offering new and returning subscribers three months of Disney+ and Hulu with ads for $4.99 per month through March 24th, a $24 savings on the typical $12.99 monthly price. The promotion comes ahead of the Oscars livestream on Hulu on March 15th.
content:
You can stream Daredevil Born Again’s new season when it arrives on Hulu on March 24th. | Disney Plus / Marvel	

If you’re looking for a way to stream the Oscars this weekend, or catch up on nominees like The Secret Agent, the Disney Plus and Hulu bundle is worth a look.  The ceremony will stream live on Hulu for the first time on March 15th, and right now, new and eligible returning subscribers can get three months of Disney Plus bundled with Hulu with ads for $4.99 ($8 off) a month, which equates to a savings of $24.
Disney Plus, Hulu Bundle (with ads)

Where to Buy:

 $12.99 $4.99 at Disney Plus (monthly)

The package grants access to thousands of movies and TVs shows, so in addition to watching Oscar nominees like It Was Just An Accident, you can also stream the latest season of Paradise, the Scrubs revival, and other Hulu titles like The Bear, The Handmaid’s Tale, and more. On top of that, you’ll also get access to the entire Disney Plus catalog, which features a range of films and shows from Disney, Pixar, Marvel, Star Wars, and National Geographic. That means you can stream Andor, Percy Jackson and the Olympians, Toy Story, The Simpsons, and Bluey, along with upcoming releases like Daredevil Born Again’s second season and the Zootopia sequel.
The main caveat is you’ll have to sit through commercials and won’t be able to download content for offline viewing. Just note that the promotion runs through March 24th at 11:59am ET. After that, the price will return to its regular $12.99 monthly price, so be sure to set a reminder to cancel if you’re only after the discount. Otherwise, though, the bundle grants access to the same catalog as the ad-free Premium plan, which is $19.99 a month.

zh.summary: Disney为新用户和返回用户提供三个月的Disney+和Hulu（含广告）服务，每月4.99美元，至3月24日止，比典型的12.99美元月价节省24美元。该促销活动在Hulu上3月15日的奥斯卡直播前进行。

title: Apple’s new M5 Max feels like a huge upgrade if you bought your laptop three years ago
summary: Apple's new M5 Max MacBooks offer minor performance improvements over M4 predecessors, but feature significantly faster SSDs that justify upgrades for users with older machines. The 2026 models claim up to 2x sustained read speeds in testing.
content:
We've been busy testing many new MacBooks, ranging from the new $1,099 M5 MacBook Air, going all the way up the $6,149 16-inch MacBook Pro with the M5 Max chip. While these computers are identical in design to last year's models, they have some things in common: neither delivers a significant lead over their M4 counterparts, although their faster SSDs might be enough reason for folks with older laptops to consider upgrading. We'll have full reviews of both laptops soon; in the meantime, here's how the M5 Max compares to its predecessors. 
The biggest actual change: Apple claims that its 2026 models can deliver "up to 2x" the sustained read  …

title: Apple Studio Display XDR review: pro at a premium
summary: Apple's new Studio Display XDR is a premium 27-inch 5K professional monitor featuring upgraded camera and spatial audio compared to its four-year-old predecessor. The display caters to creative professionals willing to pay a significant premium for top-tier specs.
content:
The Studio Display XDR is an excellent, and expensive, display for creative professionals.	

It's been almost exactly four years since Apple released the 5K Studio Display that so many wanted, even if it didn't really deliver as a high-end display. Apple has now revamped the Studio Display lineup, sort of, with another Studio Display and the Studio Display XDR. They're both 27-inch 5K (5,120 x 2,880) displays with the 12MP Center Stage camera - which is a significant upgrade over the old camera and looks clear with minimal noise - and six-speaker spatial audio system built in, and two Thunderbolt 5 ports alongside two USB-C.
The new Studio Display looks like the same panel from four years ago, just with the upgraded camera, speaker …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: US blindsides states with surprise settlement in Live Nation/Ticketmaster trial
summary: The U.S. government blindsided states with a surprise settlement in the Live Nation/Ticketmaster antitrust trial, prompting requests for a mistrial from states concerned the sudden withdrawal will influence jury deliberations. The move marks an unexpected turn in the high-stakes competition case.
content: States seek mistrial, saying "sudden disappearance" of US will influence jury.

title: One of this rugged phone’s cameras is a pop-out action cam
summary: Ulefone's new RugOne Xsnap 7 Pro rugged smartphone features a pop-out action camera attached via stabilized gimbal, allowing it to function as a standalone device while remaining tethered to the phone. The design prioritizes durability and functionality over thinness.
content:
What if your smartphone's camera wasn't locked to the back of the device? Honor's Robot Phone, which we got to see in action at MWC 2026, features a camera attached to a stabilized gimbal arm that can pop-up and look around. But it's still permanently tethered to the phone. The RugOne Xsnap 7 Pro, a new rugged phone from Ulefone, lets you pop out one of its rear cameras and use it as a standalone action camera.
The Xsnap 7 Pro is one of the first devices (following the Xever 7 and 7 Pro) from the new Ulfefone sub-brand RugOne. Instead of striving to be thin, the Xsnap 7 Pro is a thick and bulky smartphone that leverages its chunky design fo …

title: Bluesky CEO Jay Graber steps down
summary: Jay Graber is stepping down as Bluesky CEO to focus on technology development as the company matures. The leadership transition reflects Bluesky's evolution into a more established organization requiring seasoned operational leadership.
content: Graber explained that, as a more mature company, Bluesky needs a "seasoned operator focused on scaling and execution." Graber said she feels better suited to building Bluesky's technology itself.

title: An unlikely set of clues helps reconstruct ancient Chinese disasters
summary: Researchers combined Shang Dynasty oracle bone records with modern weather models to reconstruct ancient natural disasters in China. The innovative approach demonstrates how historical documents and contemporary science can illuminate past climate patterns and their impacts.
content: Shang Dynasty oracle bones and modern weather models feature in the same study.

zh.title: 一组不太可能的线索有助于重建中国古代灾难
zh.summary: 研究人员将商代甲骨文记录与现代天气模型相结合，以重建中国古代自然灾害。这种创新方法展示了历史文献和当代科学如何能够阐明过去的气候模式及其影响。

fr.title: Un ensemble improbable d'indices aide à reconstruire les catastrophes chinoises anciennes
fr.summary: Les chercheurs ont combiné les archives d'os d'oracle de la dynastie Shang avec des modèles météorologiques modernes pour reconstruire les catastrophes naturelles anciennes en Chine. L'approche innovante démontre comment les documents historiques et la science contemporaine peuvent éclairer les modèles climatiques passés et leurs impacts.

de.title: Ein unwahrscheinliches Set an Hinweisen hilft dabei, alte chinesische Katastrophen zu rekonstruieren
de.summary: Forscher kombinierten Orakelknochenaufzeichnungen der Shang-Dynastie mit modernen Wettermodellen, um alte Naturkatastrophen in China zu rekonstruieren. Der innovative Ansatz zeigt, wie historische Dokumente und zeitgenössische Wissenschaft vergangene Klimamuster und ihre Auswirkungen erhellen können.

es.title: Un conjunto improbable de pistas ayuda a reconstruir los desastres antiguos de China
es.summary: Los investigadores combinaron registros de huesos de oráculo de la dinastía Shang con modelos meteorológicos modernos para reconstruir los desastres naturales antiguos en China. El enfoque innovador demuestra cómo los documentos históricos y la ciencia contemporánea pueden iluminar patrones climáticos pasados y sus impactos.

title: It looks like the DOJ isn’t going to break up Live Nation and Ticketmaster
summary: The DOJ and Live Nation reached a tentative settlement, suggesting the government will not pursue a full breakup of the companies. However, dozens of state attorneys general oppose the deal and plan to continue the antitrust lawsuit.
content: The DOJ and Live Nation agreed to a tentative settlement, but dozens of state attorneys general don't want to drop the lawsuit.

fr.title: Il semble que le DOJ ne va pas démanteler Live Nation et Ticketmaster

de.title: Es sieht so aus, als würde das DOJ Live Nation und Ticketmaster nicht aufbrechen
de.summary: Das DOJ und Live Nation haben sich auf eine vorläufige Einigung geeinigt, was darauf hindeutet, dass die Regierung keine vollständige Aufspaltung der Unternehmen anstrebt. Jedoch widersetzen sich Dutzende von Generalstaatsanwälten des Deals und planen, die Kartellrechtsklage fortzusetzen.

es.title: Parece que el DOJ no va a disolver Live Nation y Ticketmaster
es.summary: El DOJ y Live Nation llegaron a un acuerdo tentativo, lo que sugiere que el gobierno no buscará una escisión completa de las empresas. Sin embargo, docenas de fiscales generales estatales se oponen al trato y planean continuar la demanda antimonopolio.

title: Flexible feline spines shed light on "falling cat" problem
summary: A new study on feline spinal flexibility provides insights into how cats naturally right themselves during falls, revealing a marked preference for rotating toward the right. The research advances understanding of the famous "falling cat" phenomenon and feline biomechanics.
content: Falling cats in the study also seemed to show a marked preference for turning to the right.

zh.title: 灵活的猫科动物脊椎揭示"落猫问题"
zh.summary: 一项关于猫科动物脊椎灵活性的新研究提供了关于猫科动物如何在摔落时自然翻身的见解，揭示了向右旋转的明显偏好。该研究推进了对著名的"落猫现象"和猫科动物生物力学的理解。

fr.title: Les épines dorsales flexibles des félins éclairent le problème du "chat qui tombe"
fr.summary: Une nouvelle étude sur la flexibilité de la colonne vertébrale féline fournit un aperçu de la façon dont les chats se redressent naturellement pendant les chutes, révélant une préférence marquée pour tourner vers la droite. La recherche fait progresser la compréhension du célèbre phénomène du "chat qui tombe" et de la biomécanique féline.

de.title: Flexible Katzenwirbelsäulen werfen Licht auf das "fallende Katzen"-Problem
de.summary: Eine neue Studie zur Flexibilität der Katzenwirbelssäule bietet Einblicke, wie sich Katzen während des Fallens natürlich aufrecht erhalten, und offenbart eine ausgeprägte Vorliebe zum Drehen nach rechts. Die Forschung trägt zum Verständnis des berühmten "fallenden Katzen"-Phänomens und der felinen Biomechanik bei.

es.title: Las columnas vertebrales flexibles de los felinos arrojan luz sobre el "problema del gato que cae"
es.summary: Un nuevo estudio sobre la flexibilidad de la columna vertebral felina proporciona información sobre cómo los gatos se enderezan naturalmente durante las caídas, revelando una clara preferencia por girar hacia la derecha. La investigación avanza en la comprensión del famoso fenómeno del "gato que cae" y la biomecánica felina.

title: Google’s latest Pixel Watches have fallen to their lowest prices ever
summary: Google's Pixel Watch 4 and Watch 3 have dropped to their lowest prices ever—$289.99 and $169.99 respectively. The Pixel Watch 4 now features improved durability with replaceable screens and batteries, longer battery life, and Gemini AI integration.
content:
With longer days and warmer weather on the way, it’s a good time to take your gym routine outside. Luckily, Google’s Pixel Watch 4 can help you track all your outdoor fitness activities, and right now it’s on sale at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target starting at $289.99 ($60 off), a new low price. The last-gen Pixel Watch 3 is also currently the cheapest it’s ever been, with the 41mm / Wi-Fi configuration selling for $169.99 ($80 off) — also a new low — at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target.
The Pixel Watch 4 is our favorite Fitbit-powered smartwatch, one that offers a great feature set for the price. Google’s latest wearable features dual-frequency GPS, which improves accuracy in challenging environments such as cities and dense forests, and it can automatically record certain cardio activities on your behalf, including both running and cycling. It also offers improved sleep tracking, satellite SOS (on the LTE model), and a slew of AI features courtesy of Gemini — including an exclusive raise-to-talk gesture that’s useful while on a run.
Google Pixel Watch 4

Where to Buy:

 $349.99 $289.99 at Amazon (41mm, Wi-Fi)
 $349.99 $289.99 at Best Buy (41mm, Wi-Fi)
 $349.99 $289.99 at Target (41mm, Wi-Fi)

The hardware has improved as well. Most notably, you can now replace and repair both the screen and the battery, making it a better long-term investment. The display is bigger and brighter, too, and the Pixel Watch 4 lasts about a day and a half on a single charge, or roughly 45 hours if you buy the 45mm model (up from 32 hours on the Watch 3). Charging is also faster, allowing you to charge it up to 80 percent capacity in under 30 minutes. And as a nice little extra, the included side-mounted charger lets you use the watch as a glanceable display, so you can see the battery percentage and other useful tidbits of info more easily.
Google Pixel Watch 3 (45mm, Wi-Fi)

Where to Buy:

 $299.99 $169.99 at Amazon
 $299.99 $169.99 at Target
 $299.99 $169.99 at Best Buy

title: Live Nation settles government antitrust suit — that probably doesn’t include a breakup
summary: Live Nation-Ticketmaster settled a federal antitrust lawsuit alleging illegal monopolization of the live events industry without committing to split apart the merged company. Eight states have agreed to join the settlement, with four others still undecided.
content:
On Monday, Live Nation-Ticketmaster agreed to settle a federal antitrust lawsuit with the Department of Justice. Eight states so far have indicated they plan to join the settlement, a district attorney said in court, and four others remain unclear on their status. The case alleged that it illegally monopolized parts of the live events industry, leading to higher ticket prices for consumers and locking venues into exclusive deals. The terms of the settlement have not yet been made public, but reporting in Politico and Bloomberg suggests that it won't force Live Nation to split off from Ticketmaster.

title: Donut Lab says latest test proves its solid-state battery isn’t a supercapacitor
summary: Finnish startup Donut Lab released independent test results proving its solid-state battery technology is distinct from a supercapacitor. The tests address earlier skepticism about whether the startup had genuinely achieved solid-state battery breakthroughs.
content:
When Donut Lab first announced its solid-state battery earlier this year, there was some speculation around whether the Finnish startup had actually produced a supercapacitor, which is a much shorter-term form of electrical storage. Supercapacitors can charge and discharge quickly, similar to Donut Lab's claimed solid-state battery. But supercapacitors are totally different from batteries in terms of energy storage capacity and long-term use. Was Donut Lab's battery actually just a supercapacitor in disguise?
The startup says no, and it has the independent test results to prove it. The test, which was yet again conducted by state-owned VTT  …

title: Sandberg, Clegg join Nscale board as this ‘Stargate Norway’ startup hits $14.6B  valuation

zh.summary: 英伟达支持的英国AI基础设施初创公司Nscale获得了20亿美元的新融资，估值达到146亿美元。谢丽尔·桑德伯格和尼克·克莱格已加入董事会，增强了科技高管的实力，并显示AI基础设施领域的强劲投资势头。
